_doc: Resolver config for sidecar binaries. STABLE: scripts/release/core.ts hits the GitHub releases API for each `repo` at release time, finds the asset matching the per-triple pattern, and pins its upstream download URL + SHA-256 into the signed binaries.json. BETA (release:core --channel=beta): the signed binaries.json carries this resolver verbatim instead of pinned URLs, and the running core resolves the LATEST upstream release at install/update time (binaries/upstream-resolver.ts), verifying against GitHub's published sha256 digest. This way, upstream updates reach beta users without us re-releasing. {tag} expands to the upstream release's tag_name (e.g. 'v2.8.0', 'b9310'). Verified against upstream releases on 2026-05-25.

whisper-server._note: whisper.cpp upstream only ships Windows binaries. macOS/Linux users need to build from source. Until we wire up a build-and-rehost step (or whisper.cpp ships them upstream), those triples will be missing from binaries.json.
